per_model.datalab-to/chandra-ocr-2: OCR this image to HTML, arranged as layout blocks. Each layout block should be a div with the data-bbox attribute (x0 y0 x1 y1, normalized 0-1000) and a data-label. Preserve tables, math, forms, lists, and reading order. Output HTML only.
per_model.google/gemma-4-E4B-it: Perform OCR on this image. Extract all visible text in reading order. Preserve line breaks and obvious paragraphs. Output only the transcribed text, no preamble.
per_model.deepseek-ocr:latest: Transcribe all text in this image. Output plain text only, preserving line breaks.
per_model.MedAIBase/PaddleOCR-VL:0.9b: Parse this document and extract all text, tables, and structured content. Output plain text preserving layout.
per_model.mistral-medium-3.5:latest: Perform OCR on this image. Extract all visible text preserving reading order and layout. Output only the transcribed text.
